IModifierService Interface

One Identity Manager API Server
Interface to a service that supports metadata modifiers valid for an entire API project.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
public interface IModifierService

The IModifierService type exposes the following members.

Properties
  NameDescription
PropertyConfig
Returns an object for configuration-based modification of properties.
Top
Methods
  NameDescription
AddEntityModifier
Adds a new entity modifier.
GetColumnModifiers
GetEntityModifiers
Returns the list of entity modifiers.
GetFilterProviders
Returns all registered filter providers for the specified table.
GetFkModifiers
Returns the collection of foreign-key where clauses for foreign key relations pointing to the specified table.
GetMethodConfiguration
GetPropertyModifiers
Returns the collection of property modifiers for the specified table and column.
GetViewConfigProvider
Modify
Applies the registered modifiers to the specified property.
RegisterFilterProvider
Registers a filter provider for the specified table.
RegisterViewConfigProvider
Top
Remarks
The modifier service supports different types of modifiers: Property modifiers are defined for specific database columns; or for foreign-key columns which a specific parent table. Entity modifiers are applied for every entity that is processed by the API.
